sections_json.title: 人话版
sections_json.body: 这篇论文在做什么：We show this guarantee can be dangerous on imbalanced datasets.  meta: 论文《A Quiet Failure in Calibrated Virtual Screening: Marginal Conformal Prediction Under-Covers the Minority Class, and a Class-Conditional Fix Recovers It》发表于 2026-07-07，作者 2 人，原文见 https://arxiv.

sections_json.title: 领域脉络
sections_json.body: 本文主类目 cs. 交叉类目 stat.

sections_json.title: 机制拆解
sections_json.body: Conformal prediction is being adopted in drug discovery to put an honest number on model reliability: pick an error rate alpha, and the method returns prediction sets containing the true label with probability at least 1 - alpha.  We localize the failures to generic molecular scaffolds - plain benzene and pyridine cores occurring in both classes - propose a one-number diagnostic, and show with a cost model that abstaining on affected compounds flips a screening campaign from net-negative to net-positive utility.

sections_json.title: 证据与数字
sections_json.body: Across four datasets, standard (marginal) conformal prediction hits its global 90% coverage target while leaving the minority class badly exposed: realized minority coverage falls to 64. 2% on clinical-trial toxicity, where the rare class is nearly abandoned.  The failure is not tied to one model: a random forest, a graph network, and a frozen chemical language model all reproduce it (p < 0. 001 in every case), with severity tracking baseline calibration on rare labels rather than architecture.

sections_json.title: 反例与边界
sections_json.body: The failure is not tied to one model: a random forest, a graph network, and a frozen chemical language model all reproduce it (p < 0. 001 in every case), with severity tracking baseline calibration on rare labels rather than architecture.  The failure survives realistic scaffold splits and a second conformal score, while aggregate accuracy and overall coverage stay reassuringly high, which is exactly why it is easy to miss.

sections_json.title: 跨领域连接与意外收获
sections_json.body: 本文横跨 2 个类目（cs. 意外收获：Across four datasets, standard (marginal) conformal prediction hits its global 90% coverage target while leaving the minority class badly exposed: realized minority coverage falls to 64. 2% on clinical-trial toxicity, where the rare class is nearly abandoned.  意外收获：The failure is not tied to one model: a random forest, a graph network, and a frozen chemical language model all reproduce it (p < 0. 001 in every case), with severity tracking baseline calibration on rare labels rather than architecture.

sections_json.body: Conformal prediction is being adopted in drug discovery to put an honest number on model reliability: pick an error rate alpha, and the method returns prediction sets containing the true label with probability at least 1 - alpha.
